## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this needed?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test/CI
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Art/audio

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test:coverage`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:smoke` (if UI/gameplay flow was touched)

## Visual evidence (if applicable)

Screenshots or short clips for UI/animation changes.

## Notes

- Known limitations:
- Follow-up work:
